ops.title: Re-run the semsearch 63-repo/1251-query NDCG gate
ops.description: Re-runs the ccx-vs-semble NDCG@10 quality gate after any change that can shift chunk boundaries or ranking (new grammars, chunker fixes, rank changes). Gate: for overall NDCG@10 and each of symbol/semantic/architecture NDCG@10, ccx − semble ≥ −0.005 vs .context/semsearch/baseline-semble-0.5.2.json (NDCG@5 informational). Harness: scratch semble clone /tmp/ccx-fix-semble (fork yasyf/semble @ 2fc4ffc); ccx-side driver benchmarks/baselines/ccx.py is UNTRACKED there — preserved as an attachment on the cc-notes log "semsearch NDCG gate harness preservation" (5e69ae9d); restore it if the clone is gone. 63 repos at ~/.cache/semble-bench; per-repo queries+targets in benchmarks/annotations/*.json; semble per-repo counterpart results in benchmarks/results/semble-hybrid-2fc4ffcc4093.json. No committed grader assembles the final comparison — diff avg_ndcg10/by_category per the gate-ccx-vs-semble.json schema in .context/semsearch/.

ops.text: Build the candidate binary to the driver's hardcoded path: cd <ccx repo> && go build -o /tmp/ccx-bench/ccx ./cmd/ccx (driver constant _CCX=/tmp/ccx-bench/ccx; edit ccx.py L24 instead if building elsewhere)
Verify the 63 checkouts: cd /tmp/ccx-fix-semble && uv run python -m benchmarks.sync_repos --check (drop --check to clone/update)

Clean resume state for a fresh run: rm /tmp/ccx-fix-semble/benchmarks/results/ccx-<sha12>.json where sha12 = git -C /tmp/ccx-fix-semble rev-parse --short=12 HEAD (results are resumable per repo, keyed off semble HEAD)

Run the sweep (~a few minutes): cd /tmp/ccx-fix-semble && uv run python -m benchmarks.baselines.ccx --verbose > /tmp/ccx-gate-verbose.log 2>&1 — writes benchmarks/results/ccx-<sha12>.json with per-repo ndcg5/ndcg10/by_category + top-level avg_ndcg5/avg_ndcg10/by_category

Grade: compare new avg_ndcg10 + by_category[symbol|semantic|architecture].ndcg10 against .context/semsearch/baseline-semble-0.5.2.json (per-repo detail: semble-hybrid-2fc4ffcc4093.json); FAIL if any delta < -0.005
Archive: copy the verbose log + results JSON into .context/semsearch/ (or attach to a cc-notes log) and record the verdict
